Game.Name: Zaitaku Touhyou System - SPAT4-Wide (Japan)
Game.plot: Zaitaku Touhyou System - SPAT4-Wide is a Sports game, developed and published by NTT,which was released in Japan in 1999.
Game.Notes: This cart was used to bet on horse racing, using a NTT modem. The cart isn't really emulated at this point, and the logo capture above is likely not using the correct palette. These horse betting carts came in a black shell.
